errors.postalCodeInvalid: Postal code must contain between 4 and 6 digits.
errors.cardNumberInvalid: The card must contain exactly 16 digits.

errors.transactionError: There was a problem processing the transaction.

HeroSection.description: Our team of expert <white>Jedi</white> is committed to providing you with the best service, ensuring that your website is always available and running flawlessly, like a finely tuned <green>droid</green> across the network.

ServicesSection.description: Rapid deployment solutions with guaranteed redundancy.

WhyChooseUsSection.description: At <white>Sistemas Avante</white>, we stand out for our first-class support, cutting-edge technology, and competitive pricing. As the guardians of your digital presence, we strive to provide a service as reliable as an <green>astromech droid</green> and as efficient as a <orange>jump to hyperspace</orange>.

PlansSection.description: Designed to meet the needs of different types of businesses, from startups to corporations looking to maximize their online power. <italic>May the force of Sistemas Avante be with you!</italic>

custom.description: Custom pricing based on technical requirements.

AdditionalServices.description: Expand the capabilities of your infrastructure. Tools designed to optimize, secure, and scale your digital presence to the highest level.

FAQ.title: Frequently
FAQ.description: Quick consultation protocols to resolve your technical questions about our infrastructure and galactic services.

Footer.mission: Our team of expert Jedi is committed to providing you with the best service, ensuring your website is always available and running flawlessly, like a finely tuned droid at the heart of the network.

hero.title: <orange>Contact</orange> Channel<green>.</green>
hero.description: Do you have any questions or need technical assistance? Establish a link with our support team. We're ready to help you.

content.title: Why Choose Us
content.description: At Sistemas Avante, we stand out through first-class support, cutting-edge technology, and competitive pricing. As guardians of your digital presence, we strive to provide a service as reliable as an <green>astromech droid</green> and as efficient as a <orange>jump to hyperspace</orange>.

customPage.description: Enter the parameters of your special quote to proceed with the secure payment link. Make sure your folio number matches the one issued by your advisor.

alerts.incompleteProtocol: Incomplete protocol. Complete all required access fields

hero.title: Our <orange>Services</orange><green>.</green>
hero.description: Discover our infrastructure lineup designed to meet the needs of any digital project across the galaxy.

shared.title: Shared <orange>Hosting</orange>
shared.description: Perfect for those starting their journey. We provide a friendly environment and optimized resources so your website launches with the agility of a starfighter while maintaining efficient costs for small and medium-sized businesses.

vps.title: VPS <green>Hosting</green>
vps.description: Full control over your environment. Customize your server as if you were building your own lightsaber. Get dedicated resources and the flexibility required for projects demanding high performance in the digital battlefield.

dedicated.title: Dedicated <orange>Hosting</orange>
dedicated.description: The ultimate force. Maximum power for high traffic volumes and military-grade security. It’s like having your own star base ready to face any massive challenge in cyberspace.
